_provenance: MACHINE-CAPTURED 2026-07-17 via edgartools==5.42.0 against each filer's latest 10-Q (10-K for o_pro_forma_revenue_dimensioned / pld_rental_revenue_ladder, the annual disclosures where those schedules live), exact values dumped from xb.facts.to_dataframe().to_dict('records') (concept/dim_*/numeric_value/unit_ref/currency/period_*), never hand-typed. Reproduces the filter-bug findings in docs/loom/references/xbrl-verification-universe.md (Filter-bug findings section, incl. class 6 REIT artifacts) for Task 2 revision round 1 (docs/loom/plans/2026-07-16-operational-kpi-quarterly.md).

cat_cost_of_revenue_dimensioned.note: dimensioned us-gaap:CostOfRevenue — the CostOfRevenue-bug reproducer named in the verification universe (CAT slot). Must be EXCLUDED by the deny-list.

ba_revenue_percentage.note: ba:RevenuefromContractwithCustomerexcludingassessedtaxPercentage — a company-extension %-concept (unit_ref=number, currency=NaN/absent), value=1.0 meaning 100%, NOT $1. Must be REJECTED by the $-unit guard.

hon_revenue_percentage.note: hon:RevenueFromContractWithCustomerPercentage — same %-concept false-positive class as BA (unit_ref=number, currency=NaN/absent), value=0.49 meaning 49%. Must be REJECTED by the $-unit guard.

xom_revenue_not_from_contract.note: us-gaap:RevenueNotFromContractWithCustomerExcludingInterestIncome — a legitimate energy-sector non-RFCC revenue concept (commodity/derivative sales). Must be KEPT (allow-list), currency-denominated.

sbux_deferred_revenue_dimensioned.note: us-gaap:DeferredRevenueCurrent dimensioned by TypeOfArrangementAxis=NestleGlobalCoffeeAllianceMember — a deferred-revenue LIABILITY concept (balance-sheet obligation), not earned revenue. Real filing shape is instant-context (excluded by the duration-only gate too); this fixture exercises the concept-level deny independently (defense-in-depth) via the pure _is_revenue_concept check.

o_pro_forma_revenue_dimensioned.note: us-gaap:BusinessAcquisitionsProFormaRevenue dimensioned by BusinessAcquisitionAxis=o:SpiritRealtyCapitalIncMember — REIT M&A false-positive class 6 (docs/loom/references/xbrl-verification-universe.md line 213): HYPOTHETICAL revenue as if the acquisition had closed at period start, not actual recognized revenue; admitting it double-counts against real revenue for the same period. BusinessAcquisitionAxis is not one of this module's tracked breakdown axes, so this exact row is also excluded via the empty-dimensions path in _is_dimensional_revenue_fact — the concept-level deny is added as defense-in-depth for filers/periods where this concept is broken out by a TRACKED axis (segment/geography) instead.

pld_rental_revenue_ladder.note: pld:NetIncreaseDecreaseToRentalRevenueNextTwelveMonths — REIT lease-ladder schedule false-positive class 6 (docs/loom/references/xbrl-verification-universe.md line 213): a forward-looking increase/decrease roll-forward figure, not recognized revenue for the period. Real row is NOT dimensioned in this capture (is_dimensioned=false, a schedule-level total) — denied purely at the concept layer.

so_unbilled_revenue_current.note: so:UnbilledRevenuesCurrent — a contract-asset RECEIVABLE (revenue earned but not yet billed), not a double-counting risk: real row is instant-context (period_type='instant', matching the 'Current' balance-sheet-item taxonomy convention) and NOT dimensioned in this capture. Deliberately NOT added to the deny-list (Task 2 revision, Finding 1 judgment call): _is_revenue_concept legitimately stays True for this concept (no deny substring matches 'UnbilledRevenuesCurrent'), and it is excluded by the existing is_dimensioned + period_type=='duration' gates in _is_dimensional_revenue_fact instead — a redundant concept-level deny would duplicate protection an existing gate already provides.
